reasoning: NASA's Artemis III mission, which is the only mission currently planned to land humans on the moon, has been officially delayed to mid-2027. Even the prerequisite Artemis II crewed flyby mission is delayed until at least April 2026. Therefore, no human moon landing can occur by the end of 2025. I am submitting the minimum allowed probability.
